name: CODE-T-MD
description: CODE-T MD is a powerful WhatsApp Multi-Device bot with smart automation, plugin support, and AI-like presence system.

SESSION_ID.description: Base64 encoded WhatsApp session string (required to login without QR).

BOT_NAME.description: Name of your bot displayed in messages.

PREFIX.description: Command prefix used to trigger bot commands.

OWNER_NUMBER.description: Owner phone number in international format (no + sign).

AUTO_PRESENCE.description: Enable or disable automatic presence system (online, typing, recording).

PRESENCE_TYPE.description: Type of presence: typing | online | recording | ai_human.

PRESENCE_COOLDOWN.description: Delay (in milliseconds) before triggering presence again.

STATUS_REACTION.description: Emoji used to react to status updates.

PUBLIC_MODE.description: Allow everyone to use the bot (true) or restrict to owner only (false).

AUTO_READ_MESSAGES.description: Automatically mark incoming messages as read.
